lenses.name: PaymentRiskLens
lenses.crossCheck: PaymentRiskLens must not read legacy CheckIn payment rows.

lenses.name: CheckoutQueueLens
lenses.crossCheck: CheckoutQueueLens reads checkout workflow state only and never writes deposit facts.

lenses.name: ServiceTaskQueueLens
lenses.crossCheck: ServiceTaskQueueLens reads ServiceTask state; BedStatus remains ResourceSetup-owned.

lenses.name: RiskCommandLens
lenses.crossCheck: RiskCommandLens must not double-count legacy CheckIn finance rows with new ledger rows.

lenses.name: PeriodPerformanceLens
lenses.crossCheck: PeriodPerformanceLens reads frozen PeriodAnalytics snapshots, not confirm payload totals.

lenses.name: RoomRevenuePotentialLens
lenses.crossCheck: RoomRevenuePotentialLens calculates capacity from ResourceSetup room and rate plan facts.

lenses.name: LeadFunnelLens
lenses.crossCheck: LeadFunnelLens reads intake and lifecycle tables once; it does not infer ledger facts.
